body.title: Add recall(X) gate to sprint-ticket, context-load, sorted skills
body.result: Added recall(X) step to sprint-ticket step 5, context-load step 2.5, sorted step 2.5 — recall-first before bash/inference
body.description:
Update three skill files to call recall(X) before reaching for bash/grep, making stored knowledge the first lookup. Changes: (1) sprint-ticket Step 5 (infrastructure brief): add recall(ticket title + key terms) before the bash infrastructure brief script — surface related prior work first; (2) context-load: add recall(today's focus area) as part of orient step — before reading slate; (3) sorted Step 2.5 (audit-design): add recall(decision topic) to surface related decisions before the audit runs.

In each case: if recall returns relevant results, surface them inline. If empty, proceed to bash. The pattern is recall-first, bash as fallback — not the reverse.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md, ~/.claude/skills/sorted/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** recall call must be mandatory (a step, not a suggestion); empty recall result is fine — proceed without blocking; recall before bash, not after
**Scope boundary:** IN — three skill files updated with recall step; OUT — implementing recall(X) itself (that's T-librarian-retrieval-service)
**Test plan:** read each updated skill file and verify recall step appears before bash investigation in the specified locations; recall step includes the right query terms for each context
